items.title: Jobs, Inflation, Salesforce, Broadcom, Macy’s, and More to Watch This Week
items.description: A weak jobs report on Friday could all but make a Fed rate cut official. And earnings season comes to a close with reports also coming from American Eagle, C3.ai, Macy’s, and more.

items.title: Stock Market Week Ahead: A Payrolls Showdown, Plus Zscaler, Credo And Broadcom
items.description: The market faces a busy end of summer, as jobs data questions and earnings from Broadcom and Salescorfe.com highlight the week.

items.title: August jobs report due out as Fed uncertainty looms: What to watch this week
items.description: A crucial August jobs report, drama at the Fed, and a trickle of corporate earnings await investors during a holiday-shortened trading week.

items.title: 3 Tech Stocks You Can Buy and Hold for the Next Decade
items.description: The technology sector still has room for significant growth, and these three stocks can allow you to enjoy front-row seats to that growth.

items.title: What To Expect in Markets: Jobs Report, Broadcom Earnings Lead Holiday-Shortened Week
items.description: Coming up: Labor Day holiday, August jobs report, earnings from Broadcom, Salesforce, and more.
